name: pedalverse
short_description: PedalVerse combines the thrill of downhill MTB racing with the freedom of FPV drone exploration. Customize your rider and bike, race dynamic tracks, and set records to climb the leaderboard. Tackle challenges and explore a semi-open world. Ready to take on the challenge?
detailed_description:
Pedalverse: Where Mountain Biking Meets Drone Mastery

Step into a groundbreaking fusion of extreme sports that puts you in control of both the trails and the skies. Whether you're a thrill-seeker craving the rush of downhill mountain biking or a tech enthusiast ready to master the art of FPV drone stunts, Pedalverse offers an semi open world where adventure knows no bounds.

In this game, the adrenaline never stops. Blaze through diverse terrains under varying weather conditions, from sunlit peaks to fog-shrouded valleys, or switch gears to take to the skies and execute freestyle drone stunts that defy gravity. With every ride and flight, Pedalverse challenges you to push your limits, offering an experience as dynamic and unpredictable as the environments you conquer.

Key Features:

Day and Night Cycle: Experience the thrill of racing at any time of day. Choose your favorite time of day or let the in-game clock cycle naturally. Whether you prefer the glow of dawn, the high noon sun, or the mystery of night, the choice is yours.

Dynamic Weather: Face the elements in real-time with dynamic weather conditions. Whether you're powering through a snow, navigating under heavy rain, or enjoying a clear, sunny day, you can customize the weather or let it change dynamically for a fresh challenge every time.

Dual Gameplay: Switch seamlessly between MTB downhill racing and FPV drone stunts. Ride through challenging tracks or take to the skies for thrilling freestyle maneuvers—each mode offers a unique and exhilarating experience.

Semi Open World: Explore a vast and varied landscape filled with dynamic tracks. Each area offers unique challenges, from steep mountain descents to wide-open fields perfect for drone acrobatics.

Challenges and Events: Test your skills with challenges and events that keep the action fresh.

Pedalverse is more than a game—it's a playground for adventurers and thrill-seekers alike. Will you conquer the mountain trails, master the skies, or both? The choice is yours in Pedalverse!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
